title: Notification No.133/2002-Cus(NT),dated 8.12.2006
text: Notification No.133 / 2006 - Customs (N.T) 8th December, 2006 S.O. ( E ). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Mangalore, and authorizes him to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the officers specified in the entry in column (4) of the Table below in respect of the matters specified in the corresponding entries in columns (2) and (3) of the said Table, for the purposes of adjudication, namely :- Table Sl. No. Name of the party Show Cause Notice number and Date Designation of Officer (1) (2) (3) (4) 1. M/s Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited, Kuthethoor P.O., Via Katipalla, Mangalore-575030 DRI/MRU/CCR2/ Mangalore/44/2005/545, dated the 25th July, 2006. Commissioner of Customs, New Custom House, Panambur, Mangalore. 2. M/s Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited, Kuthethoor P.O., Via Katipalla, Mangalore-575030. DRI/MRU/CCR2/Mumbai/44/2005/546, dated the 25th July, 2006. Commissioner of Customs (Import), New Custom House, Ballard Estate, Mumbai.- 400 001. 3. M/s Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals Limited, Kuthethoor P.O., Via Katipalla, Mangalore-575030. DRI/MRU/CCR2/Sahar/44/2005/547, dated the 25th July, 2006. Commissioner of Customs (/Air Cargo - Import), Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Andheri (East), Mumbai - 400 099. 4. M/s Mangalore Refinery and Petrochemicals DRI/MRU/CCR2/Nhava Sheva/44/2005/548, dated the 25thJuly, 2006. . Commissioner of Customs, (Import), Jawahar Lal -- 1 of 2 -- Limited, Kuthethoor P.O., Via Katipalla, Mangalore-575030. Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Post: Uran, District Raigad, Maharashtra.
